company_context: Datometry Has Moved to Snowflake – Datometry Datometry Joins Snowflake We’re excited to announce that the Datometry team will be joining Snowflake to help bring seamless interoperability for legacy applications to the AI Data Cloud. As enterprises are racing to leverage AI for their business, migrating to a cloud platform that enables deep integration of AI capabilities is key. And time to market is more important than ever. That’s where Datometry shines. We’re looking forward to helping more organizations jump-start their AI journey and adopt Snowflake fast and in a cost-effective fashion. Flipping the script on database migrations We started Datometry because we’ve seen too many data ecosystem migrations go sideways. Migrations were notorious for exceeding budgets and running late — often by years. This was exactly the kind of hard problem that our team thrives on! And so we did what many thought impossible: create a middleware platform that enables existing applications to run on any database. No changes to SQL or APIs needed. The Datometry platform has enabled some of the most demanding data warehouse customers to move from legacy systems like Teradata to cloud data platforms, seamlessly. So seamless indeed, IT leadership often doesn’t need to notify their business users when they cut over to the new data platform. Adopting the AI Data Cloud We’ve always known Snowflake has some of the strongest data and AI pedigree, paired with remarkable product maturity because, for the past decade, we’ve had a “front-row seat” to the cloud platform industry. In fact, our first customers used a spectrum of cloud based and cloud native systems, but Snowflake stands out with its uniquely connected and trusted platform that makes it easy to build, scale, and share data and AI applications. We’re looking forward to bringing enterprise workloads of all types to Snowflake’s AI Data Cloud. Regardless of whether these are classic ETL, business intelligence, reporting, or analytical workloads, with our technology, business users can be productive on Snowflake in no time. Customers are now able to bring all their data and become AI-ready in record time. With this announcement, we are looking forward to joining a team that shares our values of putting customers first and thinking big as we advance engineering. Migrations are just a first step towards a much more comprehensive vision of interoperability. About Datometry Datometry is the leader in database system virtualization. With Datometry Hyper-Q, enterprises can run their existing applications directly on next-generation databases without needing costly and risk-laden database migrations. Datometry counts leading Fortune 500 and Global 2000 enterprises worldwide among their customers.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours optimize their data workflows and improve overall efficiency. I came across your company, and with your recent move to Snowflake, I thought our solution could be a great fit. Can you tell me a little bit about your current data processing challenges?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (skeptical) Honestly, we've just joined Snowflake, and we're still getting familiar with their ecosystem. I'm not sure we're ready to add another solution to the mix. What makes DeepData AI so special that we should consider it?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your concerns about adding new solutions, especially during a transition period. However, DeepData AI is designed to complement Snowflake's capabilities, enhancing your data processing speeds and reducing costs. We've had success with similar companies in optimizing their data workflows without disrupting their current operations. I'd love to discuss how our solution can specifically address your needs and challenges.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (objection) That sounds interesting, but we're on a tight budget after the migration. How does your pricing compare to other solutions in the market? We can't afford to overspend on another tool.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand budget constraints are a priority. Our pricing is competitive, and we offer flexible plans to accommodate different needs and sizes of organizations. What's more, our solution is designed to help you save on your overall data processing costs in the long run. We've seen our clients achieve significant reductions in their operational expenses. Would you be open to discussing your current budget and how we can work within it?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (competitive concern) We're also evaluating other data processing solutions, including some that are native to Snowflake. How does DeepData AI differentiate itself from these competitors, especially since they're already integrated into our new ecosystem?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: While native solutions have their advantages, DeepData AI offers a level of customization and optimization that can be hard to find in one-size-fits-all native solutions. Our team works closely with clients to tailor our solution to their specific needs, ensuring the highest level of efficiency and performance. Plus, our integration with Snowflake is seamless, so you won't have to worry about compatibility issues. I think a demo would really show you the capabilities and how it can fit into your workflow.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (authority concern) I'm not the sole decision-maker on this. I'd need to discuss it with our IT team and possibly our CFO, given the budget implications. Can you provide some case studies or references that might help make a stronger case for DeepData AI?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely, we have several case studies and are more than happy to provide references from existing clients who have seen significant benefits from our solution. I can also offer a trial or a more in-depth demo tailored to your specific use cases to help your team understand the value proposition better. This way, everyone involved in the decision-making process can see firsthand how DeepData AI can support your goals.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alright, let's schedule that demo for next week. I'll make sure our key stakeholders are available, and we can discuss further how DeepData AI can fit into our plans with Snowflake.

analysis.raw:
Score: 8
Outcome: Success
Key_Objection: Budget/Price
Feedback: The seller could have provided more specific pricing details or a clear ROI analysis to address the buyer's budget concerns more effectively. Sentiment: Neutral
